title: MCP-A schema Request
description: Request for the schema primitive (SPEC §2): introspect a domain's ontology (entities, fields, types, relationships, allowed aggregations), or — with `target: action` (MAEP-0004) — introspect available actions and their input schemas. All hierarchical/operation-aware fields (`target`, `action_id`, `path`, `depth`) are OPTIONAL and additive: a request supplying only `domain_id` behaves exactly as before.

user_id.description: Authenticated user ID. MUST be FORBIDDEN if outside the domain's access scope.

domain_id.description: Domain to introspect (e.g., 'salesforce-crm'). Required when `target` is `domain` (or absent).

target.description: What to introspect (SPEC §2, MAEP-0004). `domain` (default) returns the domain ontology; `query` returns the queryable shape; `action` returns available actions or a single action's input schema. Absent ⇒ `domain` (current behavior).

action_id.description: Only meaningful when `target` is `action`. When present, return that action's input schema; when absent, enumerate the available actions.

path.description: Optional dotted path to drill into a specific node of the schema tree (e.g., 'order.line_items'). When absent, the response describes the root.

depth.description: How many levels of the schema tree to expand from the addressed node (default 2). Deeper levels are reported via `truncated`/`expandable` on the response.

include_aggregations.description: Include allowed aggregations per field (default true).
